title: Presidential Range
subtitle: Wind, cloud, and hard alpine light above treeline
description: A gallery for the broad shoulders of the Presidentials: rime-coated summits, moving weather, and long sightlines that feel larger than the frame.

title: Franconia Ridge
subtitle: Open ledge, big horizon, and trail-line geometry
description: A collection built around the sharp rhythm of Franconia Ridge: cairns, cloud shadows, and the long exposed line from Liberty to Lafayette.

title: Winter Forests
subtitle: Blue shadow, birch bark, and quiet snowpack
description: Photographs from the colder side of the White Mountains: tucked-in ravines, soft light in the trees, and the subdued detail that appears once the crowds thin out.

title: Waterfalls
subtitle: Cold runoff, moss, spray, and spring volume
description: Waterfall images with a White Mountains bias toward trailhead access, deep greens, and the misty edges where stream light feels almost metallic.

title: Trail Details
subtitle: The small surfaces that tell the whole story
description: Close, tactile frames from the Whites: worn stone, bog bridges, cairns, blazes, and the subtle man-made marks that shape a mountain day.

title: Sunrise & Alpenglow
subtitle: Early color across ridges, notches, and cold air layers
description: Images anchored in first light: soft alpenglow, low valley haze, and the short windows when the Whites shift from slate to rose.
